selection.reason: The accessible LuminaryLabs-Publish repository list was compared against the central LuminaryLabs-Dev/LuminaryLabs repo ledger. Every non-excluded Publish repo was already represented in the central ledger with known root .agent state. IntoTheMeadow was selected as the oldest eligible tracked fallback by central alignment timestamp. This pass keeps the next work narrowed to renderer consumer snapshots, grass descriptor rows, gameplay action replay, fixture manifests, and additive GameHost/game snapshot projections.

nextBuildTarget: IntoTheMeadow RenderParity Consumer Snapshot + Gameplay Replay Fixture Gate

sourceRead.manifestFact: GAME_MANIFEST defines the route, public URL, default scene, and external CDN kit URLs for meadow-area-kit and meadow-webgl-render-kit.
sourceRead.hostGap: web-host.js passes enhanced plans to renderer.render(plan) and exposes enhanced plan plus render snapshot, but does not compare expected descriptors to renderer consumption.
sourceRead.renderGap: enhanceRenderPlan emits grassSystem, grassPatches, windField, postProcess, performance, renderStyle/outline descriptors, stats, and grass descriptors, but no parity report proves consumed/unconsumed/unsupported/fallback renderer behavior.
sourceRead.grassGap: The grass descriptor stack is well formed but has no renderer readback rows for density texture, static batches, patches, draw groups, shader wind, LOD, density scale, instances, or estimated cards.
sourceRead.stateGap: advanceGameState only increments frame and lastTick.
sourceRead.contentGap: ARRIVAL_OBJECTIVES and ARRIVAL_INTERACTION_TARGETS define walk-the-path and inspect-tree, but those descriptors do not yet reduce into runtime ActionResult or snapshot.gameplay records.
sourceRead.narrowing: Build render parity helpers, GameHost renderParity projection, grass readback rows, optional ActionFrame input, first objective reducers, snapshot.gameplay, and DOM-free fixtures before visual or content expansion.
